steps.title: Simplify the equation
steps.content: Distribute on both sides: $$12(x-3)=-3(x+12)$$ $$12x-36=-3x-36$$ Add $3x$ and $36$ to both sides: $$15x=0$$

steps.title: Count the solutions
steps.content: Since the coefficient of $x$ is not $0$, the equation has exactly one solution, $x=0$.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: Choice A says there is exactly one solution, so A is correct.
